M0066_PAT_BIRTH_DT (M0066) Patient Birth Date Patient's birthdate. If only the year (YYYY) was submitted, the month is defaulted to 06 and the day is defaulted to 15. If only the month and year are submitted, the day is defaulted to 15. If this field is null, either no date was submitted or an invalid date was submitted. DATE 8 x x x x x x x
M0069_PAT_SEX1 (M0069) Sex Resident's sex 1 = Male, 2 = Female CHAR 1 x x x x x x x
M0072_PHYSICIAN_UK (M0072) Physician NPI UK Primary referring
